Truly exceptional guests, all speaking the truth in their fields of expertise.

I also need additional staff in the office and our media ministries.

Thank you and God's richest blessings on you,

Jonathan Hansen

item.title: Sufficient Grace
item.content:encoded:
Trials are a match that torches my fallacy that I’m sufficient. I have zero ounces of sufficiency in myself. This reality is highlighted all the more when I’m in dire circumstances. I simply don’t have the spiritual strength to keep going when the Red Sea is before me and the Egyptians are behind me. It brings me to this particular verse.

2 Corinthians 12:9-10

9 And He said to me, "My grace is sufficient for you, for My strength is made perfect in weakness." Therefore most gladly I will rather boast in my infirmities, that the power of Christ may rest upon me. 10 Therefore I take pleasure in infirmities, in reproaches, in needs, in persecutions, in distresses, for Christ’s sake. For when I am weak, then I am strong.

God could have delivered Paul and said to him, “My mighty deliverance is sufficient for you." But He didn’t. Instead, He left Paul in his crippled state and said, “My grace is sufficient for you, for my power is made perfect in weakness."

This verse captures something easily missed during hard times. We can occasionally misinterpret this verse to mean that God’s grace will draw us out of our difficulties and into greener pastures. But, God will not always remove the thorn from our side, but His grace will be sufficient for us regardless of the thorn. He chooses to display His power in us by sustaining us in our weakness. This grace is experienced when we reach the end of our ability and move into total dependence upon Him.

I think this is why Proverbs exhorts us to trust in the Lord with all our hearts and not to lean on our own understanding. When I lean on my own understanding, I’m failing to trust God, whose power and ability to deliver are far beyond my understanding. When I trust in the sufficiency of God’s grace, I truly can be anxious for nothing. When God does intervene and rescues me, it becomes abundantly clear to me that it was not due to my magnificent strategizing, but His glorious, sufficient grace.

Paul explains in Philippians 4:11-13, that he has learned how to be content in any circumstance no matter how severe. When things are going well or when things are going badly, Paul knows that contentment doesn’t come from circumstances, it comes from recognizing that we can do whatever God intends for us to do through Christ who strengthens us. God is so gracious to provide strength when it is needed so that we can find our identity, our confidence, and our contentment in Him.

The solution to weakness is not a stiff upper lip. It’s to lean on God with all our weight, to throw ourselves on the one whose power is made perfect in our weakness. Then, and only then, are we strong.

Please pray for the Dorcas Women and Children's Fund; we are working on doing a mission trip to Kenya. I plan to visit an orphanage that has kids from the age of 6 and older. We will need finances to cover the budget for the food and clothes needed for that day. If you are led to donate, kindly do so. A little goes a long way.

We pray for you always,

Adalia Hansen

As always, please continue to uphold us up in your prayers. I need millions of people to join Eagles Saving Nations (ESN), so there can be a national repentance to save America. If you don’t know the goals of ESN, see my web site at worldministries.org. Study it and then please join. We always need more finances to expand the Kingdom of God. We need additional staff, hopefully retired people that can volunteer their time etc. Pray that God will give us millionaires to come on board to use their resources for Kingdom expansion.

As Adalia said, we are planning a mission trip in January and need a financial breakthrough to help women and children in desperate need there. I am also meeting with leadership concerning the New World Order trying to take away the freedoms in every nation and destroy the church.

We love you so very much and you are a very important part of our ministry, so continue to pray so we can see breakthroughs.

Love, Jonathan Hansen

item.title: MAN OUGHT ALWAYS TO PRAY
item.content:encoded:
You can live without a lot of things, but if you are a believer, you cannot live your life the way Christ wants you to live unless you have a real, genuine prayer life. If your prayer life is not what it should be, your Christian life is suffering (or it will eventually suffer). Just as the physical body needs oxygen, the spiritual life thrives on prayer. Prayer is the soul’s sincere desire, the Christian’s essential air.

LUKE 18:1 “And He spake a parable unto them to this end, that men OUGHT ALWAYS to pray, and NOT TO FAINT;"

Men are always supposed to pray and not faint. Prayer is not an option, it is a command from God. This word “ought" carries with it the idea that our prayer life should be paramount. It is to be a priority in our life. The phrase “not to faint" gives us the idea that we should not grow weary in our prayer life. We should not be a coward or lose heart. Fainting is an ever present problem in a person’s prayer life.

Sin, big or small, can cause much ‘fainting’ in your prayer life. It chokes the life out of prayer. Sin destroys a good prayer life. Sin defiles. Prayer can indeed keep one from sinning.

When you have doubt in your heart or begin to doubt the Word of God, then you begin to doubt the Power of God and this affects your prayer life. Unbelief and prayerlessness go hand in hand. I know that when doubt comes into my mind, I begin to pray less. I lack interest in spiritual matters and then I begin to discern that I am under attack.

Discouragement can make you throw in the towel. There have been times when we have made our request known to God. We go before Him and expect an answer and a response. But as we pray, it almost seems as if He isn’t listening. It sometimes seems as if He doesn’t even care. You hear a voice tell you, “You are wasting your time". This is the voice of discouragement!

“Why would God not answer the prayers of His children right away? Why would God not answer my prayer? Why would He delay His answers? Why would He make me wait?" You ask yourself all these questions.

God may not answer your prayers right away, but if you are right with God, He does hear your prayers right away.

LUKE 18:7 “And shall not God avenge His own elect, which cry day and night unto Him, THOUGH HE BEAR LONG WITH THEM?"

There is an adversary roaming around like a roaring lion, seeking whom he may destroy. Knowing that should already keep us on our toes while praying. Don’t grow weary in your praying. Don’t give into evil and quit praying. Don’t be a coward when it comes to praying. DON’T LOSE HEART WHEN YOU PRAY!"

We appreciate you all for covering us in prayer. Thank you for standing with us. There are times when discouragement comes, but be strong in the Lord and in the power of His might. We are seeing God’s faithfulness and the fruit of your prayers. Continually keep us in prayer for good health, to overcome obstacles, for new partners and intercessors, and above all to accomplish what God has commissioned us to do. Also, remember Eagles Saving Nations as we need millions of people joining our team. Dr. Hansen's vision is to speak in large stadiums and have the power of God baptize people in the Holy Spirit so they can go forth with power and authority instead of fear and intimidation, in order to spark another Great Awakening.

May God richly bless you,
Adalia Hansen

item.title: FELLOWSHIP OF HIS SUFFERING
item.content:encoded:
I was reading Philippians 3:10, "That I may know Him, and the power of His resurrection, and the fellowship of His sufferings, being made conformable unto His death."

There’s a yearning from Paul to connect to Jesus on a deep relational level. Nothing else mattered to him except the relationship between him and the Lord.

"But what things were gain to me, those I counted loss for Christ." Philippians 3:7

He was willing to lose every earthly possession for the sake of intimately knowing the Lord. To experience a relationship with Jesus, it meant sharing in the fellowship of His suffering even if it meant death.

He taught that "the more we suffer for Christ, the more God will shower us with His comfort through Christ," 2 Corinthians 1:5.

Paul said also that, Everyone who wants to live a godly life in Christ will suffer persecution. We ought not to be surprised at the fiery trials we go through as if something strange is happening to us. Instead we are to be glad for these trials, they make you partners with Christ in His suffering, the end is joy of seeing His glory when it is revealed. To be like Christ, we must enter the fellowship of His suffering and death so that the life of Jesus may be seen in our bodies.

We have just returned from a three week road trip to Idaho, Oklahoma and Kansas. We had great meetings and shared the gospel. We did get into a small accident but no one was hurt. We thank God. The enemy is out there causing great attacks to the body of Christ, to those who want to go deeper in Him, he is causing great affliction. And so, we pray that you may overcome. Pray for us, our health, finances and also God’s direction.

Pray for more open doors for Dr. Hansen to minister in this season. To bring truth to the church that strongly needs an awakening.

Adalia Hansen

item.title: PRIESTHOOD OF BELIEVERS
item.content:encoded:
Dear SOC Partners,

Our role as priests is a role that includes both male and female. When people think about priests, we imagine men. Israel, however, was a nation of priests. God walked among all of them. God walks among us now through His Spirit who dwells in us. They were all intended to have communion with the Lord. The Aaronic priesthood was meant to give way to a Holy of Holies that would later on be open to all of God’s people. Now, people can come directly to God through the great High Priest, Jesus Christ. Hebrews 4:4-16

1 PETER 2:5, 9
5 You also, like living stones, are being built into a spiritual house to be a holy priesthood, offering spiritual sacrifices acceptable to God through Jesus Christ.

9 But you are a chosen people, a royal priesthood, a holy nation, God’s special possession, that you may declare the praises of him who called you out of darkness into his wonderful light...

Believers are called kings, priests, and a royal priesthood as a reflection of their privileged status as heirs of the Kingdom of God. They are called to serve Him by offering up spiritual sacrifices. In the book of Revelation, it echoes the prophecy of Exodus 19:6 saying, "You have made them to be a kingdom and priests to serve our God, and they will reign on the earth." Revelation 5:10

The priesthood of all believers means that believers are to be living sacrifices to God, dedicating their personalities, talents, and property for service to God. Let us not forget our role as priests unto God.

Pray for our upcoming trip to Oklahoma, Texas, Kansas and other states as we hold revival meetings for another Great Awakening. Pray the Lord will pour out His Holy Spirit and protect us and bring us home safely. We will be driving.

Pray that the ministry offices and staff will be protected as well while we travel.

Continually pray for finances and support from other believers towards the mission of the ministry.

We need millions to join Eagles Saving Nations to help us get into the stadiums.

Pray for the power of God to be manifested and usher in another Great Awakening, to stop the toppling of the United States by evil leaders.

Intercede to prevent the judgment of God from falling on America.


God bless you,
Adalia and Jonathan Hansen

item.title: If the Foundations are Destroyed
item.content:encoded:
The most important part of any building is the foundation. If the foundation is inferior, then the entire building will not last. It will crumble! Foundation is the base, the starting point of something. It holds all things in place.

David asked a question in Psalms 11:3, "If the foundations be destroyed, what can the righteous do?"

For example, the family has been the bedrock of civilization since creation and everything of value sits on that, everything rests on it, our institutions, our government, our way of life, everything rests on that foundation. It was established by God in Genesis 2:24 and 3:16-20. But now that foundation is in jeopardy. Forces are at work to undermine it, causing it to crack and crumble.

Jesus pronounced a blessing upon Peter and proclaimed Peter’s answer as having been derived by divine inspiration. He then stated, “And I say also unto thee, Thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church; and the gates of hell shall not prevail against it." Matthew 16:18 The rock or the very foundation upon which the Lord’s church (all of Christianity) rests, is the truth of that great confession Peter made, “Jesus is the Christ, the Son of the Living God". That is what Christianity in general is built upon. When the religious leaders of our day deny the existence of God and lead the people into vain philosophy, one must question the basis of their doctrine. There is just so much false teaching and corruption in churches and in the public eye today that the foundations in churches and the nations are cracking and falling apart.

So, what would happen if the moral foundations of our rich culture and biblical standards were destroyed? Evil legislation is destroying morality. Sodomy is legalized in so many countries and still pushing to be legalized in every culture and community of all nations. It is an abomination unto the Lord.

What about political foundations? The whole system of government is highly corrupt with corrupt officials and political leaders. Corruption and bribery scandals rocks the judiciary, lawyers and law enforcement agencies. Politicians have become increasingly greedy and liars. All they think about is how to enrich their pockets. Judgment is perverted and the law is twisted to oppress the poor and defend criminals. This is what the Prophet Habakkuk lamented about in Habakkuk 1:4, “Therefore the law is slacked, and judgment doth never go forth: for the wicked doth compass about the righteous; therefore wrong judgment proceed."

If the foundations are destroyed, what can the righteous do? God is still on His throne. To reckon with circumstances and leave God out of the reckoning, is to omit the principal factor in any and every situation. Our defense is in God. In God we trust. To the believer, God's Throne is a throne of Grace. We come there to receive Grace to help in time of need. God is our refuge. We can only but turn to God. Let’s return back to the "foundation of repentance" Hebrews 6:1. Let us once again look unto the restorer of all things. One thing is for sure, the foundations "Except the Lord build the house, they labor in vain that build it:" Psalms 127:1. Anything built outside God will not stand.

Let us pray that the spirit of repentance will come upon the church and that people will once more go back to the foundations of Christianity whereby the doctrine of Christ is the foundation.

Let us pray for families and marriages that they would stand the tests and trials brought their way.

Let us ask the Lord to send us more people that are willing to fight for the cause of Christ by joining Eagles Saving Nations. We need more members and financial supporters to help us pay for conferences and meeting facilities. Your Servant, Adalia Hansen

Dear Saint,

I could not have said it any better than how Adalia just explained it.

With the constant attacks on our foundations like family, Godly morality, borders being flooded and opened with illegal crossings, a WOKE culture is being forced down our throats, we have to have another Great Awakening.

Along with censorship of debates, opinions and convictions, countless genders being identified instead of historically recognized man and woman, child mutilations for sexual identity and drag queens teaching in the schools and churches etc., our nation is about to fall!

Please be faithful with your commitments.

I am asking every person reading this article to consider sending us a generous additional donation to help us continue to speak the truth in order to combat evil lies coming from politicians and many church leaders who say God is evolving and are now ordaining homosexuals and other deviant people with social identity problems.

Also, if you are not a member of Eagles Saving Nations (ESN), join today. Call 360-629-5248 and my secretary will sign you up or go to my web site at www.worldministries.org and join.

We have to stop this communistic toppling of the Republic to take away our liberties and freedoms and only the church can do this. This is what WMI and ESN is all about. Sounding the alarm where truth takes away deception and prayer brings conviction. Getting into the NFL stadiums and other arenas and focusing on the power of God touching the lives of Christians so they can go forth without fear and intimidation to speak the truth countering the WOKE culture that is trying to change our country's morality through fear and intimidation. We have to have another Great Awakening through ESN.

If you are a prayer warrior and would like to be a part of our Soldiers of the Cross (SOC) intercessory prayer team that prays for what WMI is doing in the nations, contact myself or Adalia at ahansen.wmi@hotmail.com, at our website: www.worldministries.org., or call us at (360) 629-5248.

May God richly bless you,

Jonathan Hansen

item.title: PRAYING FOR AN EXTENDED PERIOD OF TIME
item.content:encoded:
If you’re not baptized with the Holy Spirit with the evidence of speaking in tongues, it will be “difficult" for you to pray for long hours at a time. Without being filled with the Spirit, the attempt of praying for an extended period might be met with vain repetitions and sometimes being worn out quickly.

I CORINTHIANS 14:18
"I thank my God, I speak with tongues more than ye all:"

EPHESIANS 6:18
"PRAYING ALWAYS with all prayer and supplication IN THE SPIRIT, and watching thereunto with all perseverance and supplication for all saints"

JUDE 20
"But ye, beloved, building up yourselves on your most holy faith, PRAYING IN THE HOLY GHOST,"

You will never run out of spiritual energy and motivation while praying in the Spirit. For it is your spirit that’s praying in that moment.

1 CORINTHIANS 14:14
"For if I pray in an unknown tongue, MY SPIRIT PRAYETH, but my understanding is unfruitful."

Let's say if somebody wants to pray for seven hours at a stretch but in the first thirty minutes, they're screaming at the top of their voice to the point that they start coughing and sweating profusely. Most often with time, such people become tired even before thirty minutes is over.

I usually meditate upon this verse and I apply it to prayer:

Isaiah 40:31
"But they that wait upon the Lord shall renew their strength; they shall mount up with wings as eagles; they shall run, and not be weary; and they shall walk, and not faint."

When you wait on the Holy Spirit to help you pray, you will be able to maneuver in prayer with ease. One hour of prayer can easily be turned into three to seven hours of communion with the Holy Spirit without even noticing how much time has passed.

Below are our prayer requests for this month:

  1. We need more financial and prayer partners
  2. More Eagles Saving Nations members
  3. A need for a more advanced Laptop for television which costs $5,500

God richly bless you,

Adalia Hansen

item.title: THE NAME OF JESUS
item.content:encoded:
Jesus was exalted, lifted up, and a Name was given to Him that is above every other Name. In John 16:24-25, Jesus Himself told us to use His Name in prayer. He laid the foundation of the truth that His people can use His Name.

"Wherefore God also hath highly exalted him, and given him a name which is above every name: That at the name of Jesus every knee should bow, of things in heaven, and things in earth, and things under the earth;" Philippians 2:9-10 KJV

Have you read any passage in the Gospels where Jesus Himself used His Name? He told His disciples to pray to the Father in His Name. When Jesus prayed to the Father, whose name did He use? He is the embodiment of His Name.

Jesus says that Name has been given to you. If your father gives you his debit or credit card to use and you go to a store and purchase anything using your father's card, the financial statement will show that he bought something from that store and not you. Jesus has given you His bank card. He has entrusted His Name to you.

When we say, "In the Name of Jesus", we enter into Him. When you speak to demons, what demons recognize is the power and authority of the Lord Jesus and therefore flees.

We thank you for your prayers. A major prayer need for this season is that the Lord would send us more staff, especially in the technology department. We also need more financial partners for TV and Radio in order to get on more stations and cover a wide number of listeners.

May God richly bless you, Adalia Hansen

Dear Saint: We need to be about our Father's business. Time is running out on America and the nations unless we have another Great Awakening. A national repentance is needed, led by the church, but first the church needs repentance. The majority of churches are a disgrace with compromise and sin everywhere, accepting alternate lifestyles etc. Without another Great Awakening, America will suffer not only tyranny, as our constitutional rights and freedoms will continue to be taken away, but true Christians will be persecuted. Even if we elect the most conservative politicians it will only delay the toppling of the Republic, but it will not stop the judgment of God on America, as even the Republicans accept homosexuality. Without a national repentance, judgment will fall and millions in America will die.

Please pray with me that people by the millions will join Eagles Saving Nations so we can hold large meetings in NFL stadiums, NBA arenas, and Civic Centers. We need to invite the Holy Spirit to baptize those attending so they can be true bold warriors, speaking the truth instead of cowering in fear and intimidation as the political woke spirit tries to destroy the nations. I also need financial support for World Ministries International to continue to sound the alarm on television, radio, mission trips and meetings throughout America and around the world.

Please call 360-629-5248 or go to my web site www.worldministries.org to make a donation to support World Ministries International and also enroll in Eagles Saving Nations to support another Great Awakening. You can donate by PayPal or Zelle on my web site.

Blessings, Jonathan Hansen

item.title: PRAYER BLOCKERS
item.content:encoded:
All of us at one time or another have struggled when we don't receive something from the Lord. When you begin to grow in the knowledge of prayer, you discover it is not just getting on your knees and start talking to God. We learn to prepare ourselves to approach God in prayer. We check if our spiritual lives are in line for our prayers to be heard. It is possible for us to block our prayers to God. Let's look at some of the reasons our prayers might not be answered.

Relationships
“Husbands, in the same way be considerate as you live with your wives, and treat them with respect as the weaker partner and as heirs with you of the gracious gift of life, so that nothing will hinder your prayers."
1 Peter 3:7 (NIV)
“And when you stand praying, if you hold anything against anyone, forgive them, so that your Father in heaven may forgive you your sins."
Mark 11:25 (NIV)

There is a connection between our relationships and the effectiveness of our prayer lives. The bottom line here is that when we are praying for forgiveness we can’t expect that prayer to be answered unless we have forgiven others.

Pride
“He mocks proud mockers but shows favor to the humble and oppressed."
Proverbs 3:34 (NIV)

Do you go to God with a list of all that you are doing for Him, expecting Him to do things your way in return? Go to Him with an attitude of repentance and the clear understanding that He is God.

Selfish Prayers
“You ask, and do not receive, because you ask amiss, that you may spend it on your pleasures."
James 4:3 (NKJV)

Are your prayers only for YOU? Are you taking time to intercede for loved ones, friends, and even your enemies? Are you asking God for things just to fulfill your own lustful desires? God has called us not only to pray for ourselves, but to intercede on behalf of others, even those who do not like us. During our prayer, we should set aside time specifically aimed at praying for the needs of others, even before we pray for our own.

Continually pray for us. We are waiting on God for a major decision and we need all the prayer we can get. Pray for the health of our staff also. They are holding the Fort down and we need them to be in good health to help us bring this vision to pass. We deeply appreciate you.

Blessings,

Adalia Hansen

Dear Prayer Partner:

I really need you to pray for us and that people will support this ministry. We are still about $50,000 short from making our annual budget. Please pray for people to join Eagles Saving Nations (ESN). The goal is to get believers into stadiums and civic center's etc., in America and every country to have the glory of God come down upon them as at Pentecost, so they can go forth without fear or intimidation. Also, to speak the truth which will take away the deception of the lies being flooded on America and the nations. Evil agents of Satan are trying to intimidate people to allow immorality to sweep the nations, take away our freedoms, and persecute the righteous. In America, we are experiencing a Communist agenda to topple the Republic and move us into the New World Order of censorship and control. We must have another Great Awakening.

Also, pray that all people who subscribed to ESN as Golden Eagles last year will renew their subscriptions again this year. We need each person to renew their subscription every year. We cannot afford to lose anyone in this battle to spark another Great Awakening. The cost is tremendous to get into stadiums and hire full time personnel to coordinate such an effort. If people have made a monthly commitment, pray they are faithful. Again, please pray that many more new people will join ESN!

These burdens weigh heavily on my heart, so please pray them through until we see the victory.

Lovingly, Jonathan Hansen

item.title: The Importance of Intercessors
item.content:encoded:
It's a New Year and a New Beginning!

New beginnings can be both exciting and intimidating. They represent a chance to start fresh and make positive changes in our lives, but they also require us to let go of the familiar and step into the unknown.

We thank the Lord for bringing us through yet another year. With so many deaths this past year, we are truly grateful to still be alive. We thank Him for sustaining us all during the hardships, fears, and disappointments. He has been our rock, shield, and a place of safety. I pray that this year we will hear Him more clearly, love Him more deeply and be consumed with zeal for Him. May distractions not sidetrack us this year, but let us remain consistent and persistent.

We call upon our Lord Jesus Christ for His intercessions, His guidance and His light to shine on our path. We pray that everything falls into place according to His divine will for this year. May we overcome all the attacks and plans of the enemy. In the coming months, pray for the protection and the sustenance of our loved ones. For the ones that walked away from the Lord, pray they will return back to the sheepfold. Don't give up on them.

We have upcoming trips in the near future, one of them being Kenya. Pray for Dr. Hansen's safe flight, back and forth. Also, pray for new partners to come on board to help us accomplish the goals ahead of us. We really need prayer and financial supporters. Thank you for your prayers.

Blessings, Adalia Hansen

item.title: 2022 coming to an end
item.content:encoded:
You are a priest who intercedes. A righteous person has influence in the spirit. Intercessors identify themselves with the heart of God and feels the burden He has in His heart. When God gives you a burden, don't let it go until a breakthrough comes. They can be repetitive because you are not done yet, keep interceding. In everything you do, it must be done in love. If you don't carry the burden and intercede with love, you are doing it in vain.

Philippians 3:10 (KJV)
"That I may know Him, and the power of His resurrection, and the fellowship of His sufferings, being made conformable unto His death."

We are praying we finish well this year. We have had challenges and victories as well. We are hoping that the coming year would make up for the loss of this year. For those who have suffered loss in any kind of way, we pray that they may receive restoration and healing. As the year draws to a close, may God continue to protect, guide and help us all.

We need a financial breakthrough. Kindly pray for us in this area and for the health of all the ministry staff.

Adalia Hansen

I urge all of our intercessors to battle with Adalia and I as we pray for breakthroughs. We also need thousands more intercessors joining this team. Join your prayers with ours and together the financial walls of Jericho will come tumbling down. We pray blessings on all of our intercessors. We need your prayers so desperately.

May Jesus fill our holidays.

Jonathan Hansen

item.title: DIVINE STRENGTH
item.content:encoded:
Over these past months, I have watched many face struggles, many of which caused them to suffer and experience pain. Others watched their loved ones in pain and suffer in turn. You may be in a trying time yourself. In these times, I encourage prayer. It can provide such a powerful relief.

Isaiah 40:31 says, “But those who wait on the LORD shall renew their strength; they shall mount up with wings like eagles, they shall run and not be weary, they shall walk and not faint" (NKJV).

Experientially, I have felt the weight being lifted and a refreshing just come upon me as I waited on the Lord in prayer. He will give you strength where you are lacking. He not only gives us strength, He becomes our strength.

Hear this testimony from Paul: “The first time I was brought before the judge, no one was with me. Everyone had abandoned me. May it not be counted against them. But the Lord stood with me and gave me strength so that I might preach the Good News in all its entirety for all the Gentiles to hear. And he rescued me from certain death. Yes, and the Lord will deliver me from every evil attack and will bring me safely to his heavenly Kingdom. All glory to God forever and ever! Amen" 2 Timothy 4:16-18 (NLT). Please take note of that phrase: and gave me strength.

Continually keep us in prayer. Pray for us to finish strong. We are approaching the end of 2022 and desperately need prayers for a great financial blessing. Remember, all donations are tax deductible and we are asking God to lay it on people's hearts to send us a good end of the year blessing so we can pay our bills.

Adalia and Jonathan Hansen

item.title: Prayer for the Elections
item.content:encoded:
I believe as Christians we should get involved in selecting leaders for the purposes of God to be fulfilled. Praying for the electoral process is very vital. I don't believe we should wait for a leader to be selected before we move into obedient prayer for those in authority. There is a great need for leaders in our Nation who understand and lead according to God's righteous standards, who can help reduce the attack of religious liberties in our land.

Ask the Lord to thwart the efforts of those who would remove religious freedom from our nation and states.

Pray for wisdom for voters and a safe and fair election.

Pray for the candidates that we look up to, not to lose sight of what’s most important to God.

Ask the Lord to remove those who might try to unjustly and illegally change the outcome of the voting.

Pray that the candidates will take brave stands for righteousness, even when it may not be well received.

1 Timothy 2:1-2 (NKJV) "Therefore I exhort first of all that supplications, prayers, intercessions, and giving of thanks be made for all men, for kings and all who are in authority, that we may lead a quiet and peaceable life in all godliness and reverence."

As you pray for the upcoming elections, pray for the ministry as well. We need the Lord's intervention in what we are striving to do. Getting more subscribers and support for Eagles Saving Nations. Pray we get new staff for different areas where we are lacking expertise. Lastly, pray for a financial breakthrough for the ministry to accommodate the new staff and the missions at hand.

May God richly bless you,

Adalia Hansen

item.title: While Men Slept
item.content:encoded:
Matthew 13:25

“but while men slept, his enemy came and sowed tares among the wheat and went his way."

The enemy is on a rampage. He is sowing bad seeds in families, churches and the Nations. The sad part about all of this, is that people don’t seem to notice until the manifestation of his works. The works are done in secrecy, only the spiritually awake can be able to discern it even before it starts.

You have heard men say “I see this at such a time" such as what we call watchmen. They watch and pray, to see what the Lord will show them. The enemy can be stopped in his tracks if found out sooner rather than later. Certainly there are things now that can’t just be rooted out with a single prayer. It needs patience and waiting in prayer. The scripture says in Matthew 15:13, He replied, “Every plant that my heavenly Father has not planted will be pulled up by the roots."

One thing is for sure, when we step back and allow God to clean up areas and people around us, He will do it in His timing. A lot is rooted too deep; from false doctrines, division within the church and lost souls within our households. The enemy has done these. But in being awakened and prayerfully waiting, He will lay his "axe upon every root" Matthew 3:10 in Jesus Name.

Continually pray for Dr Hansen’s health and well-being. The ministry’s finances also needs God’s intervention, considering how people are affected financially by the economic situation around the world. We are praying for you.

God bless you,

Adalia Hansen

item.title: August Warfare
item.content:encoded:
Greetings,

It's another month where we get to thank God for His goodness. We thank Him for your lives and well-being. I would like to share with you my thoughts on these verses:

2 Chronicles 7:13-14 (KJV)

"If I shut up heaven that there be no rain, or if I command the locusts to devour the land, or if I send pestilence among my people; if my people, which are called by my name, shall humble themselves, and pray, and seek my face, and turn from their wicked ways; then will I hear from heaven, and will forgive their sin, and heal their land."

When these three things happen, a shut up heaven, locust and plagues, the response ought to be praying and seeking the Lord's face in humility. Whether in a family situation or a nation. Right now, I believe, is the time for the people to enter into a season of repenting and weeping for God's mercy over our families, ministry and nation. God is more than willing to visit His people to heal and mend where it's needed.

We are continually praying for God's intervention in the nations and families. We also are believing God for a harvest of many people coming to know Christ and experience the Baptism of the Holy Spirit. Keep us in prayer over our health, strength, wisdom and also the finances. It has been a tough year; the economy problem has affected our supporters' finances and in turn, we are straining to keep afloat. But, we are grateful to God that He has been faithful and His people's willingness to give the little they have for kingdom work advancement. We bless the Lord for it. Please write to us if you have any prayer requests. We are in this together.

We love you and may God bless you,

Adalia and Jonathan Hansen

item.title: PRAYER
item.content:encoded:
Dear SOC Team,

We value your prayers so much! Thank you for your faithfulness in giving and praying for us.

In the last six months, we have definitely had our spirit and mettle tested. Our nation is struggling to come out from the strain of the pandemic, inflation and deep divisions in our political environment. Those divisions have made their way into the church, but as believers, we strive to walk in oneness, representing our Lord Jesus Christ in every aspect and sphere of influence. That is what Eagles Saving Nations is all about. We encourage you to press deeper on this assignment. We need many people to join us to spread awareness of the truth, which is the Word of God concerning all things. We also celebrate the victory in the Supreme Court overturning ROE vs. WADE. Finally, a generational issue has been sorted out and we choose life for unborn babies.

Sadly, most of our supporters are going through financial hardships right now, with their economic situation reduced at a fast rate due to inflation. Our finances have gone down tremendously as we struggle to keep the ministry going. Prayers are needed right now in this matter. I believe God can provide no matter what season it is. I am asking you to believe with me for a financial breakthrough for the ministry. Pray with faith regarding this request.

James 5:16 "The effective, fervent prayer of a righteous man avails much."

We still owe about $13,345 for the ministry car. We thank the Lord for how He has helped us continually pay for this vehicle through His people. Pray for us to be able to fully complete the purchase. Keep praying for the health of my husband as he is constantly in warfare. Thank you.

God bless you,

Adalia Hansen

item.title: Like a Shield
item.content:encoded:
Dear Intercessors,

We greet you all in this month of June. We know that God is the author of every genuine prophecy and a prophecy has no expiration date. He has given us the assurance that it is His will for us to accomplish all that He has called us to do. People will continually back us, to make sure we reach the goals set before us. Faith without works is dead, so we just have to pray in faith believing that the Lord, just as He promised, will abundantly supply all the needs of the ministry according to His riches in glory.

You are our earthly reinforcement in this warfare. Your prayers are like a shield round about us, for health, for protection, for provision and for strength. There is still so much to do! We haven't covered the rest of the states. Please pray for all of us, that we may indeed stand strong and be renewed in our inner man. We are constantly under attack. Our strength sometimes fails, but we look to Jesus, the author and the finisher of our faith. Finances are a major issue. We cannot accomplish what we need to do without the finances. Please pray that the Eagles Saving Nations memberships increase.

Also, please pray that we can finish paying the remaining $16,601 owed on the vehicle that was purchased to enable us to travel throughout the United States, conducting tremendous meetings based on the power of Pentecost.

We thank you for your prayers and support. We love you.

Adalia Hansen

item.title: Greater is Coming
item.content:encoded:
It was a remarkable six weeks of meetings and fellowship as we traveled across twenty five states. There is a real hunger and thirst after truth and righteousness. We bless the Lord for the tremendous things He did for His own.

You could sense from the Spirit that Eagles Saving Nations (ESN) is birthing something major in the Kingdom, therefore it needs a lot of prayers, warfare and declarations. We can tell it will bring a big blow to the kingdom of darkness as more people, who are blinded, will be able to see the truth with a kingdom perspective. Satan will suffer major losses because we will be speaking as one in the affairs of this nation and that could cause a major turnaround. Just like Gideon, God is looking for those that will stand with and for Him, no matter our backgrounds. We have to be brave and do what we can to further His will in the Nation with the remaining time we have.

I urge every one of you to take some time to bombard heaven, requesting the Lord to bring in multitudes to be part of this movement. That many would be willing to give their support towards this great vision that the Lord has given us. If you have not yet subscribed to Eagles Saving Nations, then please do so and be part of this army that would love to see His Kingdom come and His will be done in our Nation.

God bless you , Adalia Hansen

I greet all of our precious partners in intercession. We need you now, more than ever before, to do spiritual warfare prayers and break down the barriers that are hindering us from accomplishing the goals of ESN and WMI. Please, as my wife mentioned, if you are not subscribed yet to ESN, go to my web site at www.worldministries.org and click on ESN to become either a golden, bald or a white eagle.

We need more intercessors so we can be more effective. Please invite others, your relatives and friends that know how to pray, to join the WMI Soldiers of the Cross.

May God richly bless all of you, Jonathan Hansen

item.title: Awakening
item.content:encoded:
Dear Intercessor,

We have been in the following different states: Washington, Idaho, Montana, Wyoming, South Dakota, Iowa, Illinois, Indiana, Ohio, Kentucky, Virginia, Tennessee, Arkansas, and Texas, so far. We have held meetings in Cincinnati, Ohio and Bristol, Virginia and met different leaders to help in this initiative to wake up the church. We have already seen miracles as one crippled was healed, her legs straightened out and she could walk straight, leaving her walker behind. Demons were cast out and coming out of people screaming. We are asking for prayers for the meetings to leave an impact behind to awake the sleeping church. Pray for us so that many people will realize the urgency of the era we have entered in and that many people will join Eagles Saving Nations in this crucial time and season. “Awake, awake, thou that sleepeth" Ephesians 5:14 (KJV)

Pray also for our safety and well being as we drive through America. We thank you and love you.

Adalia Hansen

Please also pray for another $25,000 to pay for this vehicle we needed in order to travel through America to cause another Great Awakening. Evil forces are trying to put America under the New World Order to topple America and bring persecution to the true church.

We appreciate all of you standing in the gap with us and praying these requests through to victory.

Blessings, Jonathan Hansen

item.title: Revival Meetings
item.content:encoded:
Dear Intercessors,

I’m writing to you to share exciting, upcoming news. Dr. Hansen and I will be traveling by car to different states holding revival meetings for Eagles Saving Nations for about 6 weeks, starting March 20th through all of April 2022. During these times we will need your prayers like never before. We want to reveal the Kingdom of God in its fullness in these meetings through healing, baptism of the Holy Spirit and deliverance. Pray for the Anointing (Holy Spirit) to be made manifest in these meetings.

“Wilt thou not revive us again: that thy people may rejoice in thee?​" Psalm 85:6

Pray that the Holy Spirit will work in the hearts of men to be open and to truly see the glory of God, and to desire to know more. Ezekiel 36:26 shares, “I will give you a new heart and put a new spirit in you; I will remove from you your heart of stone and give you a heart of flesh."

Pray also for finances, we need about $30,000 more to get the title. This is an urgent need so this vehicle can be used for traveling to help us bring another Great Awakening to the church in America.

Many people talk about wanting to see revival in this country and in this world. We can make the choice to seek God, personally and as a church body, by humbling ourselves and repenting. These are the keys to revival.

We hold you dearly in our prayers and we thank you very much for being a part of us. Your calling is such a hidden gem in the church that enables one to grow in giftings. We appreciate you covering us in prayer.

Adalia Hansen

Please pray with me that people, by the hundreds of thousands, will join Eagles Saving Nations. It is only the people of God who can stop this tyranny that is taking away our freedoms and enslaving us. Look at my new web site, www.worldministries.org and click on Eagles Saving Nations and join today. You will love the vision and mission to stop this communist takeover of the United States by the power of the Holy Spirit.

Like Adalia said, we appreciate and love you so very much as you pray for God's blessing and anointing to accompany us as we represent Him through the power of the Holy Spirit.

Jonathan Hansen
